etymology.description: 戌(戌) (xū, "ninth month") as phonetic + 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") as semantic = phonetic value plus association with fire
etymology.interpretation: The character combines the phonetic element 戌(戌) (xū, "ninth month") with the semantic element 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") to suggest its phonetic sound while alluding to seasonal agricultural practices related to fire.
